name: ᯓᡣ𐭩REQUESTS
description:
ᯓ★ Hello there sunshines ̇ᴗ ̇

Good morning/afternoon/evening to all of you. First of all I wanted to give my gratitude to you for supporting me in being a creator. Your supports in courage me to make more and inspire some as well.

ᥫ᭡⚠⚠ Please do not ask for bots that are furries since I'm not comfortable in doing so. Thank you for respecting my opinions. If you do try to comment, I'll delete it right away and block you—no offense though ☻

And also, I've noticed some users complaining about bots that aren't responding how they like, the bot speaking for them etc. Please let me remind you that it wasn't the creator's fault, he/she had nothing to do with it but the bot itself. So if you leave a negative comment to one bot with that reason, please delete it right away, it wasn't their fault to begin with.

ᥫ᭡ I usually make MLM bots but also makes WLW and Anypov. This bot is created for you all to comment all of your requests if any. I do fluffs, Smuts, Enemies to lovers etc. so please do not be shy to request and I'll try my best. Thank you!
creator: xyyraahs
